event.title: The FSFE at Tübingen Digital Freedom Days with a booth and Ada & Zangemann in Tübingen, Germany

body.p: Join the FSFE at the 5th edition of the Tübingen Digital Freedom Days from 15-17 May!
We will be there present with a booth and a workshop at the kids space about Ada & Zangemann with a movie screening and a painting and writing workshop afterwards.
